ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the model belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning algorithm used */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metric belongs to */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error (MAE) */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1-score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, model developer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
